name: Pariser Industries

overview.summary: Pariser Industries is a New Jersey-based specialty cleaning chemical manufacturer serving dry cleaning, commercial laundry, shirt laundry, janitorial, and water treatment markets. Known in the dry cleaning industry for Neutra-Lube (their premium neutral wet-side spotter) and their emphasis on technical field support — Pariser consultants do on-site problem-solving for complex cleaning challenges. ISO 9001 certified manufacturing. Distributed through 90 distributors across 40+ US states, Canada, and the Caribbean.
overview.historyAndReputation: Over four decades of focused specialty chemistry. Pariser built its reputation on technical support — their consultants diagnose complex cleaning problems on-site and recommend custom formulations. This service-first approach has earned loyalty among commercial laundry and dry cleaning operators who deal with difficult, recurring stain problems. ISO 9001 certification provides quality assurance.
overview.marketPosition: Mid-market with premium technical support. Broader market reach than most dry cleaning specialists due to their multi-segment approach (dry cleaning + commercial laundry + janitorial + water treatment). Strongest in the northeast US (NJ headquarters) with nationwide distribution through 90+ distributors. Competitive pricing with high-value technical consultation included.

specialties: Dry cleaning and wet cleaning chemistry

productLines.categoryDescription: Pariser's spotting line for professional dry cleaning. Neutra-Lube is the flagship — a premium neutral-pH wet-side spotter that has become a reference product in the category.

products.name: Neutra-Lube
products.description: Premium neutral pH wet-side spotter with fine additives for wetting, penetration, lifting, and suspension of water-soluble soils. Compatible with all solvent systems (perc, hydrocarbon, GreenEarth, SolvonK4). Available in gallon containers. Pariser's most recognized dry cleaning product — a reference-quality NSD.
usedFor: neutral pH applications on all fabrics
fibers: all fabrics including silk, wool, and delicates — neutral pH
products.proTips: Neutra-Lube's neutral pH and fine additive package make it safe for silk, wool, and any pH-sensitive fabric. It's the starting point for any wet-side spotting work on delicates. The wetting and penetration additives mean it works faster than plain NSD — less mechanical action needed, which protects delicate fibers.
products.alternativeTo: Adco Neutra, A.L. Wilson (no direct NSD equivalent)

products.name: SHOT-SPOT
products.description: Highly versatile stain remover that functions as a pre-spotter for wet cleaning or as a cold wash additive for oil removal. Multi-function agent that crosses wet-side and dry-side categories.
products.proTips: SHOT-SPOT is Pariser's utility player — it handles multiple stain types in one product. Good for high-volume operations where speed matters more than maximum specialization.

products.name: RightStuff
products.description: Contains eco-friendly solvents, detergents, and enzymes. Gently dissolves oils and pigments without fabric damage. Pariser's environmentally conscious spotting option.
fibers: most fabrics — enzyme component means caution on silk/wool
products.proTips: RightStuff combines three chemistries (solvent + detergent + enzyme) in one eco-friendly formulation. Good for shops marketing green cleaning but be aware of the enzyme component — not safe for protein fibers.

productLines.categoryDescription: Pariser's largest product segment — 75+ liquid laundry products covering builders, bleaches, sours, softeners, and specialty items. Formulated for everything from top-loading consumer machines to 1,000-lb industrial washer-extractors.

products.name: Commercial Laundry Line (75+ products)
products.description: Comprehensive liquid laundry chemical line including builders, bleaches, sours, softeners, and specialty items. Designed for institutional and commercial laundry operations of all sizes. Automated dispensing systems available for high-volume operations.
products.proTips: Pariser's commercial laundry line is their bread and butter — 75+ products means they have a formulation for nearly any institutional laundry challenge. Their technical consultants can audit a laundry operation and recommend the optimal product mix.
products.availability: through Pariser's distributor network with technical consultation

agentMapping.NSD: Neutra-Lube (premium neutral-pH wet-side spotter — Pariser's flagship)
agentMapping.POG: SHOT-SPOT (multi-purpose, includes oil removal), RightStuff (eco-friendly with solvent component)
agentMapping.protein: RightStuff (contains enzymes — not for silk/wool). No dedicated standalone protein spotter identified.
agentMapping.tannin: No dedicated tannin spotter identified in current public product line (unconfirmed — Pariser may have tannin products not prominently marketed online)
agentMapping.leveling: No dedicated leveling agent identified (Neutra-Lube's neutral pH serves a similar protective function on delicates)
agentMapping.rustRemover: Not identified in current public product line
agentMapping.solvent: Pariser does not manufacture dry cleaning solvents

fiberExpertise.silk: Neutra-Lube is safe for silk due to neutral pH — it's one of the better NSD options for silk spotting. RightStuff is NOT safe for silk (enzyme content). Pariser's technical consultants can advise on silk-specific challenges.
fiberExpertise.wool: Neutra-Lube safe for wool. RightStuff not safe for wool (enzymes). Standard precautions apply.
fiberExpertise.leather: No dedicated leather products identified. Refer to Kreussler or Royaltone for leather-specific chemistry.
fiberExpertise.synthetics: Full product line compatible. Pariser's commercial laundry expertise means strong knowledge of synthetic fiber processing.
fiberExpertise.delicates: Neutra-Lube is the go-to for delicate fabric work — its neutral pH and premium wetting/penetration additives make it safe and effective on moisture-sensitive fabrics.

distributionNetwork.distributionMethod: through 90+ authorized distributors plus direct sales
distributionNetwork.howToBuy: Contact Pariser Industries directly or through their 90+ distributor network across 40+ US states, Canada, and the Caribbean. Pariser offers both distributor and direct sales channels.

strengthsKnownFor: Neutra-Lube — premium NSD recognized as a reference-quality neutral spotter
Technical field consultation — on-site problem-solving by experienced consultants
Multi-segment coverage (dry cleaning + commercial laundry + janitorial)
75+ liquid laundry products — one of the broadest commercial laundry lines available
Flexible business strategy adapted to regional markets
limitations: Smaller dry cleaning product line compared to R.R. Street, A.L. Wilson, or Kreussler
No dedicated tannin spotter, rust remover, or specialized ink remover in public product catalog
Stronger in commercial laundry than in dry cleaning specialty chemistry
Limited online product information compared to competitors
industryReputation.whoUsesThem: Operators who value technical support and on-site consultation. Commercial laundry operations needing comprehensive chemical systems. Dry cleaners in the northeast US (close to NJ headquarters). Shops looking for a reliable NSD (Neutra-Lube). Multi-service operations that do both dry cleaning and commercial laundry under one roof.

education.trainingResources: In-service education with hands-on training and instructional charts. Pariser consultants provide on-site training tailored to specific operations.
education.technicalSupport: Field consultants available for on-site problem-solving. Technical support covers operator safety, production optimization, linen handling, and replacement cost reduction. Consultants diagnose complex cleaning challenges and recommend custom formulations.
education.publications: Product technical data sheets. Training materials provided during on-site consultations.

gonrIntegration.relevance: Pariser's Neutra-Lube is one of the best NSD options available for professional spotting, especially on delicate fabrics. When GONR protocols call for a neutral wet-side spotter, Neutra-Lube is a premium choice. Pariser's technical consultation service is valuable for operators tackling unusual or recurring stain problems.
gonrIntegration.agentCrossReference: When a GONR protocol calls for: NSD/neutral wet-side spotter → Neutra-Lube (premium quality, safe for all fibers); all-purpose pre-spotter → SHOT-SPOT; eco-friendly spotter → RightStuff (not for silk/wool).
gonrIntegration.whenToRecommend: Recommend Pariser when: the protocol calls for a premium NSD; the operator handles high volumes of delicate fabrics requiring neutral-pH spotting; the shop needs on-site technical consultation for complex or recurring stain problems; or the operation includes both dry cleaning and commercial laundry (Pariser covers both segments with one supplier relationship).

links.technicalDocs: Contact Pariser directly for technical documentation
links.training: Contact Pariser directly for training programs
